input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the available space in the design event judging area may be limited.

            rule S.4.7.2: The available space in the Design Event judging area may be limited.
S.4.7.2 The available space in the Design Event judging area may be limited.

final_answer: rule S.4.7.2: The available space in the Design Event judging area may be limited.
